back_translation: A psalm of David. O LORD, vindicate me, for I have walked in my integrity, and I have trusted in the LORD without wavering.
O LORD, examine me and test me; search my heart and my mind.
For Your steadfast love is before my eyes, and I walk in Your truth.
I do not sit with deceitful men, nor associate with hypocrites.
I hate the assembly of evildoers, and I will not sit with the wicked.
I wash my hands in innocence, and I go around Your altar, O LORD,
to proclaim aloud thanksgiving and to declare all Your wonderful works.
O LORD, I love the dwelling of Your house, and the place where Your glory resides.
Do not sweep away my soul along with sinners, nor my life with men of bloodshed,
in whose hands are wicked schemes, and whose right hands are full of bribes.
But I will walk in my integrity; redeem me and be merciful to me.
My foot stands on level ground; in the congregations I will bless the LORD.
